TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 220

SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT JUDGE ERNEST F. GOLDSMITH'S DEPT. SF MUNI COURT'S P.J. ASSIGNED A MUNI CASE AS FOLLOWS: THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DOLMA TAMANG, AND A PRIOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT AGAINST DEFT ALEX GIVA, THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENSUED: POSSESION OF THE REAL PROPERTY AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF YUK YIN LAU, WITHOUT ANY AWARD OF PAST DUE RENTAL FEES. ------------------------------------------------------------ #1/220 JUDGE:GEORGE CHOPPELAS; L.NAJERA/CSR; GVANHEST/CLERK 10:00AM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL FRANCIS KELLY, DEFT CESAR ARRIETA PRESENT IN PRO PER. A DEFAULT HAS BEEN ENTERED AS TO DEFT ALEX GIVA. AN UNCONTESTED COURT TRIAL HELD FOR DEFT DOLMA TAMANG IN ROOM 622. A STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFT CESAR ARRIETA HAS BEEN READ INTO THE RECORD.
1/CHOPPELAS. SETTLEMENT AS TO DEFT CESAR ARRIETA READ INTO THE RECORD IN DEPT 1, ROOM 220. PROVE-UP AS TO DEFT DOLMA TAMANG CROSS-ASSIGNED TO SUPERIOR COURT ROOM 622 BEFORE JUDGE ERNEST GOLDSMITH.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GIVA, ALEX TAMANG, DOLMA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3425 -16TH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO,CA, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARRIETA, CESAR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3425 - 16TH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94114, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR CONDITION OF STAY.
